Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Aug-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Eclectic Cookery Inc.'s motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $390 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-13-2007 Text Ruling

APPEARANCES: JESSE RALPH, ESQUIRE (415.307.0608) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS THROUGH COURTCALL.
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER.
